primary_source: Wall, D. D. (1960). Fibonacci series modulo m. American Mathematical Monthly 67(6), 525-532. DOI: 10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541.
note: a=27=3^3, a FST/STF structural integer. 9|27 opens all three orbit classes. The single Singularity route has bq=eq=9 (the fixed point of qa_step). Witnesses the FST baseline regime.
